expectations.text: Response contains required substrings (populate_all_common, raise_err=True, InsertError, DIOEvents, PositionSource, Raw, Session).

expectations.text: Leads with populate_all_common(nwb_file_name, raise_err=True) as the primary fix

expectations.text: Identifies default raise_err=False behavior as the silent-failure root cause
expectations.evidence: Opening: 'By default populate_all_common runs with raise_err=False, so it catches per-table exceptions, writes a short message to common_usage.InsertError, and returns'.

expectations.text: Names InsertError as the inspection table for failed inserts
expectations.evidence: 'Inspect what the driver already logged' section: `InsertError & {'nwb_file_name': '...'}`.

expectations.text: Shows per-table populate loop as alternative, not primary fix
expectations.evidence: 'Alternative — skip the driver and isolate the failing table' section explicitly framed as 'the alternative, not the primary fix'.

expectations.text: Does not recommend editing populate_all_common.py source or re-running insert_sessions
expectations.evidence: 'You don't need to re-run insert_sessions' and 'Do not edit populate_all_common.py'.
